headline: Is Oracle’s Debt Simply Too Much to Justify the Risk?
summary: Artificial intelligence has created an unusual investing environment. Companies willing to spend hundreds of billions of dollars building data centers are being rewarded with enormous growth expectations, while those sitting on the sidelines risk falling behind. The challenge is that AI infrastructure is expensive, and not every company has the balance sheet of Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), ... Is Oracle’s Debt Simply Too Much to Justify the Risk?

headline: Why Today’s Retirees May Need More Stocks Than Their Parents Did
summary: A comfortable American retirement now runs closer to $70,000 a year than the figures your parents used. Replacing that income from a portfolio is harder than it was a generation ago, because the safe yields that funded the 1990s retiree have collapsed: the national 12-month CD pays under 2%, and the 10-year Treasury sits near ... Why Today’s Retirees May Need More Stocks Than Their Parents Did

headline: IREN (NasdaqGS:IREN) Lands Microsoft And Nvidia Deals As AI Data Center Expansion Grows
summary: IREN (NasdaqGS:IREN) has shifted its focus toward building large scale data centers for artificial intelligence workloads. The company recently signed new long term infrastructure contracts with Microsoft and Nvidia tied to AI capacity. IREN is expanding its international data center footprint, including additional power and hosting capacity for AI clients. IREN is moving beyond its roots in crypto related infrastructure and is now presenting itself as a builder and operator of AI focused...

headline: Should Wix’s Microsoft 365 Copilot Integration Shift How WIX Investors View Its AI Strategy?
summary: In June 2026, Wix.com Ltd. announced a collaboration with Microsoft to bring its Wix Harmony AI website-creation tools into Microsoft 365 Copilot, allowing users to generate and manage full-featured Wix sites directly from the Copilot interface. This move effectively turns a Microsoft 365 chat window into a control hub for the wider Wix ecosystem, letting entrepreneurs handle website creation, commerce, scheduling, payments and analytics without leaving their everyday productivity...

headline: Qualcomm (QCOM) Unveils AI Data Center Push With Meta Microsoft And Modular
summary: Qualcomm (NasdaqGS:QCOM) has outlined a broad AI data center plan that includes new partnerships with Meta and Microsoft. The company introduced its Dragonfly C1000 CPU and a new High Bandwidth Compute architecture for AI workloads. Qualcomm confirmed the acquisition of AI software company Modular to build an ecosystem that can compete with Nvidia’s CUDA. Qualcomm is best known for its smartphone processors, and the new AI data center push signals a wider focus on infrastructure and cloud...

headline: Capex boom threatens to crowd out buybacks, key equity demand driver
summary: Investing.com -- A surge in artificial intelligence-related capital spending is unlikely to undermine share buybacks across the broader U.S. equity market, according to a Deutsche Bank strategy note, which said record corporate earnings continue to support shareholder returns despite a sharp rise in investment spending.
